title: hyoscyamus tibesticus
intro: Hyoscyamus tibesticus, also known as Syrian henbane, is a flowering plant native to the Middle East and North Africa. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include the presence of scopolamine and hyoscyamine, alkaloids that have sedative, antispasmodic, and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Syrian henbane include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and pain management, as well as its use in treating gastrointestinal issues such as ulcers and irritable bowel syndrome. In herbal preparations, Syrian henbane is often used in tinctures, teas, and ointments, and should be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to its potential toxicity and side effects.
